calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq., for the Plaintiff JOHN STEWART COMPANY,
Erekle Chaichmelachvili sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant JOHN COSTELLO.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 364 Eddy Street, #510, San Francisco, CA 94102.

Holdover damages $763.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,078.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Line 1

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff is present.
Attorney Francisco Torres of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky (415-977-0444), counsel for the plaintiff is present.
Defendant is NOT present.

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of AUG-11-2014 remains on calendar.
